name: fidelity_brokerage_statement_activity_extractor
description: Extract structured activity data from a Fidelity monthly brokerage statement including securities, cash, and card transactions.

account_header.description: Top-level account identification and statement period information

account_number.description: Account number found in the top-right corner of the statement

account_name.description: Account name found in the top-right corner of the statement

date_range.description: Statement period date range (e.g., July 1 – July 31, 2015)

securities_bought_sold.description: Individual settled trade rows for securities bought and sold

symbol_or_cusip.description: Symbol or CUSIP identifier for the security

transaction_description.description: Description such as 'You bought' or 'You sold'

quantity.description: Number of shares or units traded

cost_basis_of_close.description: Cost basis of the position after the transaction

transaction_cost.description: Commission or transaction fees associated with the trade

transaction_total.description: Total cost or proceeds from the transaction

wash_sale_amount.description: Annotation line for wash sale amounts if applicable

lt_gain_loss.description: Annotation line for long-term gain or loss if applicable

accrued_interest.description: Annotation line for accrued interest if applicable

total_securities_bought.description: Summary total for securities bought in the section

total_securities_sold.description: Summary total for securities sold in the section

net_securities_bought_sold.description: Summary net total for securities bought and sold

trades_pending_settlement.description: Rows for unsettled trades with future settlement dates

settlement_date.description: Future settlement date for the trade

symbol_or_cusip.description: Symbol or CUSIP identifier for the security

quantity.description: Number of shares or units pending

unit_price.description: Unit price for the pending trade

cost_basis_of_close.description: Cost basis of the position after the pending transaction

transaction_total.description: Total cost or proceeds for the pending transaction

lt_loss.description: Annotation line for long-term loss if applicable

lt_disallowed_loss.description: Annotation line for long-term disallowed loss if applicable

total_trades_pending_settlement.description: Summary total for trades pending settlement

securities_transferred_in.description: Rows for securities transferred into the account

symbol_or_cusip.description: Symbol or CUSIP identifier for the security

quantity.description: Number of shares or units transferred

total_securities_transferred_in.description: Summary total for securities transferred in

securities_transferred_out.description: Rows for securities transferred out of the account

symbol_or_cusip.description: Symbol or CUSIP identifier for the security

quantity.description: Number of shares or units transferred

total_securities_transferred_out.description: Summary total for securities transferred out

dividends_interest_income.description: Rows for dividends, interest, and other income including reinvestments

security_name.description: Name of the security paying income

symbol_or_cusip.description: Symbol or CUSIP identifier for the security

transaction_description.description: Description such as 'Dividend received' or 'Muni exempt interest'

quantity.description: Quantity of shares or units if reinvested

total_dividends_interest_income.description: Summary total for dividends, interest, and other income

margin_activity.description: Margin account summary with period and year-to-date columns

period.description: Statement period for the margin activity

rate.description: Interest rate applied to the margin balance

interest_paid_period.description: Total interest paid for this period

other_activity.description: Rows for corporate actions and miscellaneous activities

symbol_or_cusip.description: Symbol or CUSIP identifier for the security

cost_basis_of_close.description: Cost basis of the position after the transaction

transaction_cost.description: Transaction fees associated with the activity

transaction_total.description: Total cost or proceeds from the activity

merger_details.description: Annotation line for merger details if applicable

escrow_payment.description: Annotation line for escrow payment if applicable

deposits.description: Rows for deposits and EFT inflows

total_deposits_eft_in.description: Summary total for deposits and EFT in

withdrawals.description: Rows for withdrawals and EFT outflows

total_withdrawals_eft_out.description: Summary total for withdrawals and EFT out

debit_card_activity.description: Debit card transaction activity with nested summaries and card details

beginning_balance.description: Beginning balance for the card period

cash_advances.description: Total cash advances on the card

fees.description: Total fees charged to the card

total_payments.description: Total payments made on the card

ending_balance.description: Ending balance for the card period

ending_point_balance.description: Ending point balance for the card

card_transactions.description: Individual card transactions grouped by card type

card_type.description: Card type such as Platinum or Gold

trans_date.description: Transaction date for the card purchase

post_date.description: Post date for the card transaction

location_reference.description: Location or description of the transaction

transaction_total.description: Total amount of the card transaction

card_subtotal.description: Subtotal for the specific card type

bill_payments.description: Rows for bill payments with YTD tracking

post_date.description: Post date for the bill payment

payee.description: Payee name for the bill payment

account.description: Account number for the bill payment

total_ytd_payments.description: Summary total for year-to-date bill payments

date.description: Date of the fee or charge

description.description: Description of the fee or charge

amount.description: Amount of the fee or charge

total_fees_and_charges.description: Summary total for fees and charges

security.description: Security associated with the tax withholding

total_federal_taxes_withheld.description: Summary total for federal taxes withheld

total_state_taxes_withheld.description: Summary total for state taxes withheld

total_foreign_taxes_withheld.description: Summary total for foreign taxes withheld

total_taxes_withheld.description: Summary total for all taxes withheld

daily_additions_subtractions.description: Date-by-date table for money market or cash account activity

account_name.description: Account name (e.g., Fidelity NY Muni Money Market)
